pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's Java source and target compatibility from version 11 to 17.
Upgrade the Keycloak dependency from version 12.0.4 to 22.0.0 to align with the new Java version and feature set.
Update the testcontainers-keycloak library to version 3.0.0 to support the newer Keycloak version.
Upgrade the Docker Maven Plugin from 0.35.0 to 0.40.2.
Add RestEasy 6.2.4.Final as a managed dependency, likely required for Keycloak 22.x extensions.
Add Freemarker 2.3.31 as a managed dependency for theme rendering.
Restructure the Maven modules to reflect a new project layout with separate apps and extensions directories.
Rename the root artifact ID from keycloak-project to keycloak-project-example.
Switch to a parameterized version format using revision and changelist properties.
Update the Docker image name and file path to match the new project structure and naming convention.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add gitignore entries for local runtime directories to prevent committing generated state.
Ignore Infinispan data directories for local cluster deployments.
Ignore TLS certificates and keys generated for local development.
Explicitly allow the OpenTelemetry Java agent JAR to be tracked despite general JAR exclusion.
Remove the blanket ignore for the bin directory to allow tracking specific binaries like the OTel agent.
Add standard Node.js gitignore rules for frontend tooling.
Ignore data directories for specific application examples.
Ignore session data directories for local cluster deployments.

readme.md.general_idea: Rename the project title from 'Template' to 'Example' to better reflect its purpose as a comprehensive setup guide.
readme.md.human_impl: Keycloak Project Template -> Keycloak Project Example

readme.md.general_idea: Add a detailed introduction section explaining the project's role in supporting the full lifecycle of Keycloak development.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '# Introduction' section with description of lifecycle support.

readme.md.general_idea: Document specific use cases for Developers, Publishers, Testers, and Operators to clarify target audiences.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '## Use-Cases' section with roles a) through d).

readme.md.general_idea: Expand the highlights section to list specific extensions, testing tools, and infrastructure examples included in the project.
readme.md.human_impl: Replaced generic highlights with detailed list including SMS Authenticator, Cypress, HAProxy, etc.

readme.md.general_idea: Explicitly document the required tool versions, specifically mandating Java 17.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '## Usage envcheck' table specifying Java 17, mvn 3.8, docker 20.10.

readme.md.general_idea: Refine build instructions to clarify integration test profiles and remove outdated docker-maven-plugin specific build commands from the main flow.
readme.md.human_impl: Updated '## Build' and '### Build with Integration Tests' sections.

readme.md.general_idea: Document the new platform-agnostic Java launcher script used to start the Keycloak environment, replacing simple docker-compose commands.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '## Run' section describing 'java start.java'.

readme.md.general_idea: Provide instructions for enabling HTTPS using mkcert and configuring host files for local development.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '### Enable HTTPS' section with mkcert and hosts file instructions.

readme.md.general_idea: Document how to enable OpenLDAP integration via the launcher script.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '### Enable OpenLDAP' section with 'java start.java --openldap'.

readme.md.general_idea: Document how to switch the database from H2 to PostgreSQL via the launcher script.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '### Enable Postgresql' section with 'java start.java --database=postgres'.

readme.md.general_idea: Document how to run the legacy Wildfly-based Keycloak distribution instead of the default Quarkus distribution.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '#### Run with Legacy Keycloak' section with 'java start.java --keycloak=keycloak'.

readme.md.general_idea: Explain how to access metrics via the Wildfly management interface and custom event listeners.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '### Access metrics' section.

readme.md.general_idea: Provide instructions for configuring Graylog for log analysis, including module installation steps.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '### Enable Graylog' section with wget/unzip instructions.

readme.md.general_idea: Document how to enable Prometheus for metrics scraping.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '### Enable Prometheus' section with 'java start.java --metrics=prometheus'.

readme.md.general_idea: Document how to enable Grafana for dashboards and alerting, including TLS permission notes.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '### Enable Grafana' section with 'java start.java --grafana'.

readme.md.general_idea: Document how to enable distributed tracing with OpenTelemetry and Jaeger.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '### Enable Tracing' section with 'java start.java --tracing'.

readme.md.general_idea: Provide examples for instrumenting external applications (like Spring Boot) to send traces to the collector.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '#### Instrumentation' section with Java agent example.

readme.md.general_idea: Reference the clustering examples directory for advanced deployment setups.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '### Clustering' section pointing to deployments/local/cluster.

readme.md.general_idea: Explain how to configure non-default Docker networks and host IPs for the launcher.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '### Running with non-default docker networks' section.

readme.md.general_idea: Document the structure and users of the example realms (Acme-Apps, Internal, LDAP, SAML).
readme.md.human_impl: Added '## Acme Example Realm Configuration' section with realm details.

readme.md.general_idea: Update Docker image build instructions to include Keycloak.X and Alpine slim options.
readme.md.human_impl: Updated '## Custom Docker Image' section with new mvn commands.

readme.md.general_idea: Update the command for running the custom Docker image to use the new image name and configuration file.
readme.md.human_impl: Changed 'thomasdarimont/custom-keycloak' to 'acme/acme-keycloak' and updated env vars.

readme.md.general_idea: Document how to run End-to-End tests using Cypress.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '## Run End to End Tests' section.

readme.md.general_idea: Update script documentation to reflect the new Java-based launcher scripts instead of shell scripts.
readme.md.human_impl: Replaced 'etc/triggerDockerExtensionDeploy.sh' with 'java bin/deployExtensions.java'.

readme.md.general_idea: Document how to import and export realm configurations using the new Java script.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '## Import-/Exporting a Realm' section.

readme.md.general_idea: Add documentation for auxiliary tools like Mailhog and phpldapadmin.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '# Tools' section with URLs and credentials.

readme.md.general_idea: Provide instructions for configuring IntelliJ IDEA external tools for extension deployment and realm config.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '## Add external tool in IntelliJ...' sections.

readme.md.general_idea: Document how to scan the generated Docker image for vulnerabilities using Trivy.
readme.md.human_impl: Added '## Scan Image for Vulnerabilities' section.
